hero.title: Build Beautiful Interfaces
hero.subtitle: A modern frontend boilerplate powered by Tailwind CSS, daisyUI, and jQuery.
features.title: What's Included
features.tailwindDesc: Utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development.
features.daisyDesc: Beautiful Tailwind CSS component library with themes.
features.jqueryDesc: Familiar DOM manipulation and event handling.
i18n.title: Multi-language Support
i18n.subtitle: Switch languages using the buttons in the header. Language preference is saved automatically.
footer.copy: © 2025 FrontendKit. Built with Tailwind CSS, daisyUI & jQuery.
we_rewards.mystery_restocking: Mystery Boxes are restocking! Get ready for extra rewards & extra surprises.
we_rewards.select_team_warning: Please select your betting team before submission
we_rewards.step_two_desc: Make Your Prediction for all 40 football matches
we_rewards.step_three_desc: Win more matches to move up your Leaderboard Ranking
we_rewards.faq_q1: How do I participate in the prediction event?
we_rewards.faq_a1: Simply Login or Register an account within the event period (26 December 2025 00:00 - 25 January 2026 23:59) to participate 40 matches for free.
we_rewards.faq_q2: How does the predicted win or loss affect me?
we_rewards.faq_a2: Each correct prediction earns you W/L points. More points means higher ranking and larger prize share.
we_rewards.faq_q3: What is the use of winning points?
we_rewards.faq_a3: Winning points determine your leaderboard position which affects your share of the prize pool.
we_rewards.faq_q4: Will my ranking drop if I stop making predictions?
we_rewards.faq_a4: Yes. Other players may accumulate more points and overtake your position if you stop predicting.
we_rewards.faq_q5: What is the cut-off date of the competition?
we_rewards.faq_a5: The competition ends on 25 January 2026 at 23:59.
we_rewards.faq_q6: If there is more than 1 player with the same points, how will the rankings be determined?
we_rewards.faq_a6: Rankings will be determined by who submitted predictions first (earliest timestamp wins the tiebreak).
we_tournaments.faq_a1: WESlot Tournament is a weekly slot tournament by WE88, in collaboration with Pragmatic Play. It features selected Pragmatic Play slot games and allows players from different regions to compete for exciting prizes!
we_tournaments.faq_q2: How do I participate in the tournament?
we_tournaments.faq_a2: Simply click Join Tournament and play any eligible Pragmatic Play slot games during the event period to accumulate points on the leaderboard.
we_tournaments.faq_a3: Scores are based on your total wager amount on eligible games. Higher bets yield more points per spin.
we_tournaments.faq_q4: When does the tournament start and end each week?
we_tournaments.faq_a4: Tournaments run weekly from Monday 00:00 UTC to Sunday 23:59 UTC. Check the banner for exact timing.
we_tournaments.faq_q5: How often are leaderboard rankings updated?
we_tournaments.faq_a5: Leaderboard rankings are updated in real-time as players accumulate points throughout the tournament.
we_tournaments.faq_q6: Who is eligible to win prizes?
we_tournaments.faq_a6: All registered WE88 members who participate and finish within the prize positions on the final leaderboard are eligible.
we_tournaments.faq_q7: How and when are prizes awarded?
we_tournaments.faq_a7: Prizes are credited to your WE88 wallet within 3–5 business days after the tournament ends.
we_tournaments.faq_q8: Is there a turnover requirement for prizes?
we_tournaments.faq_a8: Tournament prizes carry a 1x wagering requirement before withdrawal.
we_tournaments.faq_q9: Can I view past leaderboard results?
we_tournaments.faq_a9: Yes. Use the Records date filter on the Leaderboard tab to view results from previous tournaments.
we_tournaments.faq_q10: Can I invite my friends to join the tournament?
we_tournaments.faq_a10: Absolutely! Share your referral link and compete alongside friends on the leaderboard.
